articles.title: Gamers Hate Nvidia's DLSS 5. Developers Aren’t Crazy About It Either - WIRED
articles.description: Nvidia’s new AI upscaling gaming technology struck gamers as uncanny and off-putting. Developers don't seem to like it, either, but it could be “the default” in a few years.

articles.title: Samsung's Galaxy Z TriFold Replaced My Phone, Tablet, and Laptop—But There's a Big Catch - PCMag
articles.description: The Galaxy Z TriFold aims to be an all-in-one device—serving as your phone, tablet, and even a makeshift laptop. It largely delivers on that promise, though its price is undeniably steep, and Samsung is no longer selling new models.

articles.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines - The Verge
articles.description: Google is beginning to replace news headlines in its search results with ones that are AI-generated. After AI clickbait nonsense in its Google Discover news feed, it’s starting to mess with headlines in the “10 blue links” too.
